title: Steel & Silver
description: Add legendary swords from The Witcher to Minecraft!
body:
# Steel & Silver ## Bring legendary swords from The Witcher universe into your Minecraft world. More will be added soon. **To obtain it, rename any sword on the anvil. Works with Optifine or "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** ![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8413b3b832e59106770673eaea2212320ae2cc49_0.webp) ![Aerondight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K1gB5DTa/images/8e12169217ade4c6f33ceda0c67bfaf119b85b4e.png) ![fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db1495800ae455d7aeb9238a84230a5136559553.png) **Currently implemented** From The witcher: - Aerondight - Zireael You can suggest your idea on my Discord server.
